lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.10]What's that? Look here! What's that? Look there!
[00:05.50]Curious eyes are everywhere!
[00:07.34]Tide pool, sand, the bright blue sky,
[00:10.54]Wonder, wonder — that's how we fly!
[00:12.78]What's that? Look here! What's that? Look there!
[00:20.04]Curious eyes are everywhere!
[00:21.92]Ask a question, find a clue,
[00:23.70]Curious kids always do!
[00:25.52]What's that? Look here! What's that? Look there!
[00:34.40]Curious eyes are everywhere!
